title: Steel Wool Grade 0000 Martin Cox 16 Steel Wire Wool Pads for Cleaning, Finishing and Polishing Metal, Wood and Automotive Bodywork
features: 16 Steel Wool Pads per pack | 0000 SUPER FINE -- Ideal for varnish, polyurethane, smooth laquer and shellac. Buffing woodwork and furniture to a high lustre with wax or oil. Also cleans your precision tools.
5 Grades to choose from 1(medium), 0(fine), 00(very fine), 000(extra fine), 0000(super fine)
Ideal for use on metal, wood, car bodywork
Clean, Polish, Prep or Finish your project using this range of steel wire wool
description: Available in Grades Fine 0, Very Fine 00, Extra Fine 000, Super Fine 0000 or Medium 1 Steel wool is also commonly known as wire wool or wire sponge. It is made up of steel filaments which are very fine and flexible. Used by woodworkers and craftsmen when they are working on paint, lacquer and varnish to prepare the surface. It can also be used with a chemical stripper. The finer grades are ideal for applying wax polishes as the fine filaments help the wood to absorb the wax evenly
